arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Unai Emery admits Aston Villa player could leave, Wolverhampton Wanderers latest on midfielder
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Wolverhampton Wanderers' January moves and a potential departure from Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Why Ollie Watkins 'got a bit frustrated' as striker closes in on Aston Villa history
arts.sum: “He knows that chances are going to come and he’s always there to bury them and that’s what we want from him," Tielemans said. Villa moved two points off fourth place after drawing with Arsenal and Tielemans hailed the team's display of character to come back from two goals behind.

arts.ttl: Youri Tielemans makes Champions League vow after Aston Villa's fightback against Arsenal
arts.sum: Youri Tielemans was at the heart of Aston Villa's fightback in their 2-2 draw with Arsenal and Unai Emery's side are targeting a spot in the top four this season

arts.ttl: Preview: Monaco vs. Aston Villa - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Champions League clash between Monaco and Aston Villa, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa predicted XI vs Monaco: Starting lineup for Champions League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Aston Villa could line up for Tuesday's Champions League clash with Monaco.

arts.ttl: Celtic to land next Patrick Roberts says Aston Villa insider as £10m battle with Mourinho emerges – Parkhead transfer bulletin
arts.sum: The champions are set to launch a seven-figure bid for Villa forward Louie Barry

arts.ttl: Hull City reach agreement with Monaco for Eliot Matazo
arts.sum: Championship side Hull City have reached an agreement with AS Monaco to sign midfielder Eliot Matazo (22), according to L’Equipe. Les Monégasques were prepared to part ways with Matazo as…
